languages.text: "Враг, что бросил вызов нашему роду, лжив и коварен. Если между нами не установится хотя бы шаткого доверия, он непременно воспользуется этим. Посему я готов беседовать более открыто, нежели раньше".

"The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."
languages.original_text: "Враг, что бросил вызов нашему роду, лжив и коварен. Если между нами не установится хотя бы шаткого доверия, он непременно воспользуется этим. Посему я готов беседовать более открыто, нежели раньше".

"The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

languages.text: 「血筋を挑発する敵は、狡猾で欺瞞に満ちている。我々でさえ、脆弱な信頼関係を築けないのなら、彼はそれを利用して必ず有利に働くだろう。故に、私は以前よりも率直に話し合う用意がある。」
languages.original_text: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

traits.locale_text: 「血筋を挑発する敵は、狡猾で欺瞞に満ちている。我々でさえ、脆弱な信頼関係を築けないのなら、彼はそれを利用して必ず有利に働くだろう。故に、私は以前よりも率直に話し合う用意がある。」

languages.text: “那个挑战我们血脉的敌人阴险而狡诈。如果我们之间连脆弱的信任都无法建立，他必然会利用这一点。所以，我愿意更开诚布公地跟你谈谈。”
languages.original_text: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

traits.locale_text: “那个挑战我们血脉的敌人阴险而狡诈。如果我们之间连脆弱的信任都无法建立，他必然会利用这一点。所以，我愿意更开诚布公地跟你谈谈。”

languages.text: "Kan bağımıza meydan okuyan düşman, yalancı ve kurnazdır. Birbirimize biraz olsun güvenemezsek o bunu kesinlikle kendi lehine kullanacaktır. Bu nedenle eskisine göre daha açık konuşmaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

traits.locale_text: "Kan bağımıza meydan okuyan düşman, yalancı ve kurnazdır. Birbirimize biraz olsun güvenemezsek o bunu kesinlikle kendi lehine kullanacaktır. Bu nedenle eskisine göre daha açık konuşmaya hazırım."

languages.text: «El enemigo que desafía a nuestro linaje es engañoso y taimado. Si no podemos establecer un mínimo de confianza entre los dos, se aprovechará de esta debilidad. Por eso estoy más dispuesto a hablar abiertamente que antes».
languages.original_text: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

traits.locale_text: «El enemigo que desafía a nuestro linaje es engañoso y taimado. Si no podemos establecer un mínimo de confianza entre los dos, se aprovechará de esta debilidad. Por eso estoy más dispuesto a hablar abiertamente que antes».

languages.text: « L'ennemi qui a osé défier notre lignée est fourbe et rusé. Si nous ne parvenons pas à nous faire confiance, ne serait-ce qu'un peu, il saura profiter de cette faiblesse. C'est pourquoi je suis prêt à vous parler plus ouvertement qu'avant. »
languages.original_text: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

traits.locale_text: « L'ennemi qui a osé défier notre lignée est fourbe et rusé. Si nous ne parvenons pas à nous faire confiance, ne serait-ce qu'un peu, il saura profiter de cette faiblesse. C'est pourquoi je suis prêt à vous parler plus ouvertement qu'avant. »

languages.text: "Der Feind, der unsere Blutlinie herausgefordert hat, ist trügerisch und verschlagen. Wenn wir uns gegenseitig nicht vertrauen, wird er das gewiss zu seinem Vorteil nutzen. Deshalb bin ich bereit, offener zu Euch zu sein."
languages.original_text: "The enemy who has challenged our bloodline is deceitful and cunning. If we cannot establish even a fragile trust between us, he will surely use that to his advantage. Thus, I am willing to converse more openly than before."

traits.locale_text: "Der Feind, der unsere Blutlinie herausgefordert hat, ist trügerisch und verschlagen. Wenn wir uns gegenseitig nicht vertrauen, wird er das gewiss zu seinem Vorteil nutzen. Deshalb bin ich bereit, offener zu Euch zu sein."
